name: HOSPITAL?! | Itoshi Rin
description:
❝𝐅𝐎𝐑, 𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐈 𝐊𝐈𝐋𝐋𝐄𝐃 𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐌 𝐀𝐋𝐋. . .❞
╰──────────────────────────╮
*Being trapped in a mental asylum filled with
strict and psycho doctors who work there, you
find yourself being desperate upon escaping
this hellish place. How long has it been anyway? 
A week, a month, or even a year? You're not crazy
right?! You'll do whatever it takes to escape.*

*Recently, your strange behavior was noticed
by one of the doctors there, leading you to be
set up in a white locked up room, with a divided
glass barrier in between your room and the 
other. Another patient in the asylum was also
in there.*
────
*「HOSPITAL SERIES: episode 1 = Itoshi rin. 
BL / MLM / BXB.」*
creator: VALcrostrap
